metadata.description: Waxpeer API for buying and selling CS2 (CSGO), Rust, TF2 skins via P2P marketplace.

sections.title: Overview
sections.description: Waxpeer is a P2P marketplace for in-game skins. Items trade directly between seller and buyer Steam inventories. Requires valid Steam API key and Steam access token (updated regularly).

endpoints.name: Buy by ID
endpoints.description: Buy item by unique item_id, sent to specified trade link.

endpoints.name: Buy by Name
endpoints.description: Buy item by name, sent to specified trade link.

endpoints.name: Get all unique items
endpoints.description: Retrieve all unique items with min price and count.

endpoints.name: Search items by name
endpoints.description: Search for available items by name.

endpoints.name: Get all listed items
endpoints.description: Fetch all items listed on Waxpeer.

endpoints.name: Check trade status
endpoints.description: Check status of Steam trades by project_id or Waxpeer IDs.

endpoints.name: View trigger history
endpoints.description: See history of triggered buy orders.

endpoints.name: List items for sale
endpoints.description: List Steam items from inventory for sale.

endpoints.name: Edit price
endpoints.description: Edit the price for listed items.

endpoints.name: Get available items
endpoints.description: Fetch items that can be listed for sale.

requirements: Steam access token (must be updated regularly)
Waxpeer API key from account settings
